title: ESC Open Volunteers
excerpt: The ESC is in need of a handful of volunteers to help out during the tournament. You’d be helping to enter in scores and act as an ambassador of the ESC. The shifts are 3.5 hour each if you’re able to help out for any of the shift it would be greatly appreciated.
content:
The ESC is in need of a handful of volunteers to help out during the tournament. You’d be helping to enter in scores and act as an ambassador of the ESC.

The shifts are 3.5 hour each if you’re able to help out for any of the shift it would be greatly appreciated.
